title: Fragment: 'I Faint, I Perish With My Love!'.
content:
I faint, I perish with my love! I grow
    Frail as a cloud whose [splendours] pale
    Under the evening's ever-changing glow:
    I die like mist upon the gale,
    And like a wave under the calm I fail.
meaning:
"Fragment: 'I Faint, I Perish With My Love!'." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
